recommendations.title: Ocean's Eleven
recommendations.overview: Danny Ocean and his gang attempt to rob the five biggest casinos in Las Vegas in one night.

recommendations.title: Of Mice and Men
recommendations.overview: An intellectually disabled giant and his level headed guardian find work at a sadistic cowboy's ranch in depression era America.

recommendations.title: The Strange Love of Martha Ivers

recommendations.title: All Quiet on the Western Front
recommendations.overview: Paul Baumer and his friends Albert and Muller, egged on by romantic dreams of heroism, voluntarily enlist in the German army. Full of excitement and patriotic fervour, the boys enthusiastically march into a war they believe in. But once on the Wester

recommendations.title: Come and See
recommendations.overview: The invasion of a village in Belarus by German forces sends young Florya into the forest to join the weary Resistance fighters, against his family's wishes. There he meets a girl, Glasha, who accompanies him back to his village. On returning home, Fl

recommendations.title: Lifeboat
recommendations.overview: During World War II, a small group of survivors is stranded in a lifeboat together after the ship they were traveling on is destroyed by a German U-boat.

recommendations.title: The Hurt Locker
recommendations.overview: During the Iraq War, a Sergeant recently assigned to an army bomb squad is put at odds with his squad mates due to his maverick way of handling his work.

recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: The Red Balloon
recommendations.overview: A young boy discovers a stray balloon, which seems to have a mind of its own, on the streets of Paris. The two become inseparable, yet the world’s harsh realities finally interfere.
